description: Connects to the PandaDoc API v1 to sync documents, templates, contacts, forms, and workspace members into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Generate an API key from PandaDoc Settings → Integrations → API. The key is used in the Authorization: API-Key header.

methods.name: Install / Validate API Key
methods.description: Validate that api_key is present and verify it against GET /workspaces/.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: GET /workspaces/ and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with workspace name.

methods.name: Sync All Resources
methods.description: Sync documents, templates, contacts, and forms into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Documents
methods.description: Paginated list of all PandaDoc documents.

methods.name: List Templates
methods.description: Paginated list of all PandaDoc templates.

methods.name: List Contacts
methods.description: Paginated list of all PandaDoc contacts.

methods.name: List Forms
methods.description: Paginated list of all PandaDoc forms.

methods.name: Get Document
methods.description: Retrieve a single document by ID.

methods.name: Get Document Details
methods.description: Retrieve detailed information for a document including fields and tokens.

apis.name: Install / Validate API Key
apis.description: Validate api_key is present, then verify with a health check.

apis.name: Sync All Resources
apis.description: Sync all PandaDoc resources (documents, templates, contacts, forms)

apis.name: List Documents
apis.description: Fetch all documents using count+page pagination.

apis.name: List Templates
apis.description: Fetch all templates using count+page pagination.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: Fetch all contacts using count+page pagination.

apis.name: List Forms
apis.description: Fetch all forms using count+page pagination.

name: PandaDocConnector
